CREATE TABLE hex_test (id UInt32, hex_string String);
SELECT unhex(hex_string) FROM hex_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT unhex(hex_string) FROM hex_test WHERE id IN (2, 3);
SELECT reinterpretAsUInt64(reverse(unhex(hex_string))) AS num FROM hex_test WHERE id = 4;
SELECT hex_string, unhex(hex_string) FROM hex_test WHERE LENGTH(hex_string) % 2 = 1;
WITH (SELECT unhex('1A2B3C4D') AS result) AS subquery SELECT reinterpretAsUInt32(result) FROM subquery;
SELECT unhex('0A'), unhex('0F'), unhex('FF', '00') FROM hex_test WHERE id = 5;
SELECT * FROM second_test WHERE data = unhex('CAFEBABE');
SELECT unhex((SELECT hex_string FROM hex_test WHERE id = 4)) AS result;
CREATE VIEW hex_view AS SELECT id, unhex(hex_string) AS binary_value FROM hex_test;
SELECT * FROM hex_view WHERE binary_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsUInt64(reverse(unhex(hex_string))) AS reversed_num FROM hex_test WHERE LENGTH(hex_string) > 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hex_test WHERE unhex(hex_string) IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT unhex('A1B2C3D4')) AS val SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(val) AS float_value;
